channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Laura Whitmore attends Sky BAFTA TV pre-party with husband Iain Stirling while pregnant
item.description: Laura Whitmore, 41, attended the Sky BAFTA TV pre-party on Saturday alongside her husband Iain Stirling, 38, showcasing her growing baby bump in a stylish sheer gown over a bandeau top and matching bo...

item.title: Tropical Storm Caloy Enters PAR, No Impact on Philippine Weather Expected
item.description: Tropical Storm Caloy, internationally named Hagupit, entered the Philippine Area of Responsibility (PAR) on May 9, 2026, at 6 PM, marking the third tropical cyclone of the year in the Philippines. Acc...

item.title: Netball Australia sees a surge of new mums returning to elite sport
item.description: In 2026, Netball Australia is witnessing a significant rise in elite athletes balancing motherhood and professional sport. Players like Emily Mannix, Maddy Proud, Gina Crampton, and Shamera Sterling-H...

item.title: BJP Responds to Kejriwal's Remarks Comparing PM Modi to Aurangzeb Amid ED Action in Punjab
item.description: The BJP on Saturday strongly reacted to Arvind Kejriwal’s comparison of Prime Minister Narendra Modi with Mughal emperor Aurangzeb. The comments came following fresh Enforcement Directorate (ED) raids...

item.title: Water Supply Will Be Interrupted in Dar and Pwani on Sunday for Maintenance
item.description: People living in different parts of Dar es Salaam and the Coast Region (Pwani) are going to face water supply interruption for almost 10 hours on Sunday, May 10, 2026. The disruption will start from 3...

item.title: Bannu Police Prevent Suicide Attack, Two Officers Martyred
item.description: In Bannu, Khyber Pakhtunkhwa, law enforcement authorities bravely foiled a suicide attack on Fateh Khel police post late Saturday night, resulting in the martyrdom of two police personnel. Two other o...

item.title: Seriake Dickson Confirms NDC Registration Is Fully Legal and United Ahead of 2027 Elections
item.description: The national leader and founder of the Nigerian Democratic Congress (NDC), Seriake Dickson, don clear road say no any court matter dey wey fit stop or affect the party registration. As the party hold ...

item.title: Fantasy Baseball: Recommended Starting Pitchers and Streaming Rankings for May 8-10
item.description: Nick Pollack of Pitcher List provides detailed daily rankings for starting pitchers suitable for fantasy baseball streaming from May 8 through May 10, 2026. The rankings categorize pitchers into four ...

item.title: Notable Kapamilya Actresses Known for Realistic Mother Roles in Teleseryes
item.description: ABS-CBN highlights several Kapamilya actresses who have masterfully portrayed motherhood in various teleseryes, showing both the challenges and joys of being a mother. These actresses, including promi...

item.title: Mohammed VI Tower Becomes Morocco’s Tallest Rocket-Inspired Skyscraper
item.description: The Mohammed VI Tower, now the tallest building in Morocco and the third tallest in Africa, rises 250 meters from the banks of the Bou Regreg River. Inspired by a young Moroccan businessman’s visit to...

item.title: Tuppence Middleton Discusses OCD, Career, and Personal Quirks
item.description: Born in Bristol, Tuppence Middleton, 39, trained at ArtsEd in London before gaining recognition in films such as The Imitation Game and Mank. She has also appeared on stage in productions including Th...

item.title: Xenophobic attacks on African migrants undermine South Africa’s gateway to Africa aspirations
item.description: In this opinion piece, Gwen Ngwenya highlights how rising anti-migrant sentiment and violent attacks on African nationals in South African cities are damaging the country’s long-standing image as the ...

item.title: 18-Year-Old Man Arrested for Killing a Woman in Pakil, Laguna
item.description: In Pakil town, Laguna province, an 18-year-old man was arrested by authorities for the alleged killing of a woman. The victim's body was discovered on Friday in a vacant lot behind a hospital in Baran...

item.title: Government to Support Former Prisoners with Startup Funds to Reduce Repeat Crimes
item.description: President Samia Suluhu Hassan has directed creation of a special fund to support ex-inmates who gain vocational skills while in prison. Speaking during a graduation ceremony at Tanzania Correctional T...

item.title: Three Men Arrested in New York for Attempted Smuggling of 89 Firearms to Canada
item.description: Authorities in New York State apprehended three men—Malik Bromfield, a 22-year-old Canadian citizen; Faizan Ali, a 25-year-old Pakistani citizen; and Kamal Salman, 22, who holds citizenship in Canada,...

item.title: Manchester City edge Brentford while Man United hold Sunderland to goalless draw
item.description: Manchester City show serious form for second half as dem knack Brentford 3-0 for Saturday match. Pep Guardiola side don score three goals in the second half through Jeremy Doku, Erling Haaland, and Om...

item.title: Delhi Heightens Security Following Intelligence Warnings of Potential Terror Threats
item.description: Delhi has been placed on high alert after intelligence agencies issued warnings about potential terror attacks targeting prominent offices and crowded areas in the city. The Delhi Police, along with o...

item.title: Pakistan Marks First Anniversary of Marka-i-Haq, Emphasising Military Preparedness
item.description: On Saturday, Pakistan observed the first anniversary of Marka-i-Haq, the military engagement with India, which the state commemorates as a defining moment in the nation’s history. According to the Int...

item.title: Peter Magyar takes office as Hungary’s prime minister, pledging economic reform and renewed EU ties
item.description: Centre-right leader Peter Magyar has officially taken office as Hungary’s prime minister after a decisive electoral victory that ended Viktor Orban’s 16-year rule. Backed by a strong mandate and a con...

item.title: One Nation secures first federal lower house seat as Liberals lose Farrer
item.description: In a historic result for Australian politics, Pauline Hanson's One Nation has won the federal seat of Farrer in New South Wales, marking the party’s first-ever entry into the House of Representatives....
